title: Exposed DB, Exposed Credentials, Exposed KEV Exposures, Subdomain Takeover
abstract:
We have published the real-time metrics for Exposed DB, Exposed Credentials, Exposed KEV Exposures, Subdomain Takeover:

https://echelongraph.io/exposed-databases https://echelongraph.io/leaked-credentials https://echelongraph.io/exposed-ai-keys https:&
abstract_zh: 这些工具就像是网络侦探的利器，专门揪出那些藏在暗处的数据和秘密！从漏掉的数据库（Exposed DB），到裸露的凭证（Exposed Credentials），再到那些敏感的 KEV Exposures 和容易被劫持的子域名（Subdomain Takeover）。我们让你一眼就能看到网上潜伏的风险，就像侦探小说里一样惊心动魄！快来查查看你的网站有没有也被这些“不良分子”盯上吧！
